title: Willes next target
wikitext:
[]: Wille's next target.             Quote Post by wiser3754 » Mon Sep 16, 2019 3:47 pm As we all know, Wille's mandate is to destroy Nerv and all their Evas, despite using a Nerv Eva to power an ex-Seele ship. So my question is what is Wille's next target/s? Manufacturing facilities? Communication hubs? Nerv's new command centre/ship? Or restoration efforts due to the spare parts and ammuntion conatraints?

[]: Re: Wille's next target.             Quote Post by Joseki » Mon Sep 16, 2019 4:47 pm Wille will move in reaction to NERV starting Final Impact using the Moon somehow, and the climax of the movie will take place there. My 2 cents.

[]: Re: Wille's next target.             Quote Post by Blockio » Tue Sep 24, 2019 9:29 am I don't think they will go straight for the HQ next, at least one minor facility before that. Unless they pull some wonder weapon out of their butts, they just don't have the ressources yet to pull a stunt like this

[]: Re: Wille's next target.             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Sep 24, 2019 10:32 am They'll go to the Moon next to regroup because that's where the colonies of post-3I survivors are subsiding through the use of Antediluvian technology. One of these colonies is Wille's main base and will be where Shinji finds some peace of mind or whatever. Also Kaji and adult classmates will be there.

[]: Re: Wille's next target.             Quote Post by wiser3754 » Tue Sep 24, 2019 6:42 pm How in the world can colonies exist on the moon considering it's rotation speed? Also how does the Wunder dock or land on the moon at that rotation speed? Wille uses Anti-l barrier technology to restore Paris so it's most likely colonies also use this tech for restoration and survival.

[]: Re: Wille's next target.             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Sep 25, 2019 12:11 am Eva has always ignored physics at its leisure. Always. We have no idea how effective the pillar tech even is for anything other than temporarily holding the L Barrier at bay. The Moon has an atmosphere AND most of it still isn't coreified (or it wasn't last time we saw it, anyway). Ever heard of the phrase "Chekov's Gun"? The current state of the Moon is potentially an example of one.

[]: Re: Wille's next target.             Quote Post by Heaven Piercing Man » Wed Sep 25, 2019 12:55 am The moon? Where did that come from?

[]: Re: Wille's next target.             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Sep 25, 2019 3:34 am Plenty of moon action in Rebuild...

[]: Re: Wille's next target.             Quote Post by Blockio » Wed Sep 25, 2019 11:58 am Reichu wrote: They'll go to the Moon next to regroup because that's where the colonies of post-3I survivors are subsiding through the use of Antediluvian technology. One of these colonies is Wille's main base and will be where Shinji finds some peace of mind or whatever. Also Kaji and adult classmates will be there.

[]: Re: Wille's next target.             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Sep 26, 2019 9:05 am @MirrorUniverseAsuka : Please stop spamming threads with these insubstantial comments. Review the forum guidelines so that you can contribute more appropriately. When in doubt don't post at all.

[]: Re: Wille's next target.             Quote Post by Heaven Piercing Man » Sat Sep 28, 2019 11:37 pm Blockio wrote: Sounds reasonable enough, I can roll with this.

[]: Re: Wille's next target.             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Sep 29, 2019 1:24 am It's speculation, yes. Can't be that "wild" (in the bad way) if you had to ask.
